name: Build Test and Install
description: "Builds the binaries, runs the tests, and installs the library"

inputs:
  numcpp_no_use_boost:
    description: “NUMCPP_NO_USE_BOOST compiler flag”
    required: true
  shell:
    description: the shell to use
    required: true
  boost_root:
    description: the root of the boost installation
    required: true
  cxx_std_version:
    description: the c++ standard to use for compilation
    required: false
    default: 17
  numcpp_use_multithread:
    description: compile with multithread support
    required: false
    default: false
  sudo:
    description: run command with sudo
    required: false
    default: ""

runs:
  using: "composite"
  steps:
    - name: Configure CMake
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      run: cmake -B ${{github.workspace}}/build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=${{inputs.cxx_std_version}} -DBOOST_ROOT=${{inputs.boost_root}} -DNUMCPP_NO_USE_BOOST=${{inputs.numcpp_no_use_boost}} -DNUMCPP_USE_MULTITHREAD=${{inputs.numcpp_use_multithread}} -DBUILD_TESTS=ON -DBUILD_MULTIPLE_TEST=ON -DBUILD_EXAMPLE_README=ON -DBUILD_EXAMPLE_GAUSS_NEWTON_NLLS=ON

    - name: Build
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      run: cmake --build ${{github.workspace}}/build --config Release -j88

    - name: pytest
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}/test/pytest
      run: pytest

    - name: ctest
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}/build
      run: ctest -R BinaryLoggerTestSuite -R LoggerTestSuite

    - name: Install
      shell: ${{inputs.shell}}
      working-directory: ${{github.workspace}}
      run: ${{inputs.sudo}} cmake --build ${{github.workspace}}/build --config Release --target install

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    clang \
    lsb-release \
    wget \
    software-properties-common \

RUN wget -O - https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh > /miniconda.sh && \

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN conda env create -f test/pytest/environment.yml

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

    bash /miniconda.sh -b -p /opt/conda && \
    rm /miniconda.sh

ENV PATH=/opt/conda/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN conda env create -f test/pytest/environment.yml

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

source /opt/conda/bin/activate test

cd /app

# Configure CMake
cmake -B /app/build \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
    -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=17 \
    -DBOOST_ROOT=/opt/conda/envs/test \
    -DNUMCPP_NO_USE_BOOST=OFF \
    -DNUMCPP_USE_MULTITHREAD=OFF \
    -DBUILD_TESTS=ON \
    -DBUILD_MULTIPLE_TEST=ON \
    -DBUILD_EXAMPLE_README=ON \
    -DBUILD_EXAMPLE_GAUSS_NEWTON_NLLS=ON

# Build
cmake --build /app/build --config Release -j$(nproc)

# Run pytest
cd /app/test/pytest
pytest || true

# Run ctest
cd /app/build
ctest -R BinaryLoggerTestSuite -R LoggerTestSuite || true

# Install
cmake --build /app/build --config Release --target install

echo "FINAL_STATUS = SUCCESS"

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    clang \
    lsb-release \
    wget \
    software-properties-common \
    gnupg \
    ca-certificates \
    git \
    cmake \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN wget -O - https://repo.anaconda.com/miniconda/Miniconda3-latest-Linux-x86_64.sh > /miniconda.sh && \
    bash /miniconda.sh -b -p /opt/conda && \
    rm /miniconda.sh

ENV PATH=/opt/conda/bin:$PATH

RUN conda config --set auto_update_conda false && \
    conda tos accept --override-channels --channel https://repo.anaconda.com/pkgs/main && \
    conda tos accept --override-channels --channel https://repo.anaconda.com/pkgs/r

WORKDIR /app

COPY repo/ /app/

RUN conda env create -f test/pytest/environment.yml

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

set(TARGET_NAME NumCppPy)

set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON) # -fPIC

file(
    GLOB_RECURSE _source_list 
    LIST_DIRECTORIES false
    "${NUMCPP_INCLUDES}/*.c*"
    "${NUMCPP_INCLUDES}/*.h*"
)

foreach(_source IN ITEMS ${_source_list})
    get_filename_component(_source_path "${_source}" DIRECTORY)
    string(REPLACE "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}" "" _group_path "${_source_path}")
    string(REPLACE "${NUMCPP_INCLUDES}" "" _group_path "${_group_path}")
    string(REPLACE "/" "\\" _group_path "${_group_path}")
    source_group("${_group_path}" FILES "${_source}")
endforeach()

add_library(${TARGET_NAME} SHARED 
    Constants.cpp 
    Coordinates.cpp 
    Core.cpp 
    DataCube.cpp 
    DateTime.cpp
    FFT.cpp
    Filter.cpp 
    Functions.cpp 
    ImageProcessing.cpp 
    Integrate.cpp 
    Linalg.cpp 
    Logger.cpp
    NdArray.cpp 
    Polynomial.cpp 
    Random.cpp 
    Roots.cpp 
    Rotations.cpp 
    Special.cpp 
    Utils.cpp 
    Vector.cpp
    NumCppPy.cpp
    ${_source_list}
)

target_include_directories(${TARGET_NAME} SYSTEM PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/pybind11)
target_include_directories(${TARGET_NAME} PRIVATE 
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${NUMCPP_INCLUDES}
)

set(Python_USE_STATIC_LIBS True)
find_package(Python 3.11 REQUIRED
    COMPONENTS
    Development.Module
)

if(UNIX)
    execute_process(
